prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 15171 名、2026 年扩招 4.0%（使位次数字增大）、软科排名上升 6 位（增强吸引力）、抖音高热曝光（关注度提升）、化工材料类社会热度偏低（压制作用）、河北省考生总数略增及省控线上涨（竞争加剧）等多重因素，扩招效应与竞争加剧效应相互对冲，预计 2026 年最低位次较 2025 年小幅后移（位次数字增大），预测最低位次约 15518 名，区间 15018–16018 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 12248 → 13125 → 14804 → 15950 → 15171, showing an overall backward trend. From 2021 to 2024, rankings increased for four consecutive years (competition eased), with a slight rebound to 15171 in 2025. Over the past 3 years, the cumulative backward shift is about 2960 places. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 15171. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hebei was 132 in 2021, 140 in 2022, 141 in 2023, 149 in 2024, and 149 in 2025. For 2026, the plan is 155, an increase of 6 students (+4.0%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition and tends to increase the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Chemical Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Rankings: 62nd in 2021, 64th in 2022, 64th in 2023, 68th in 2024, 63rd in 2025, and 57th in 2026. The ranking has been stable with an upward trend in recent years, rising 6 places from 2025 to 2026, enhancing its appeal to candidates. In 2024, the reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed (involving an investigation into teacher ethics, with the university stating it handled the matter according to law and regulations). In 2025–2026, there were no negative records for Beijing University of Chemical Technology in reputation documents, and overall reputation remained stable. Douyin popularity ranking: 7th (high heat), with comprehensive popularity of about 7.4 million, indicating high exposure among 211 universities. Study planning bloggers like Zhang Xuefeng have repeatedly recommended it as a 'cost-effective Ministry of Education directly affiliated Double First-Class university,' which helps attract attention. No incidents of file rejection or abnormal admissions were observed. Fifth round of discipline evaluation: Chemical Engineering and Technology A, Chemistry A-, Materials Science and Engineering A-, totaling 3 A-class disciplines, showing outstanding strength among 211 science and engineering universities. Majors such as Chemical Engineering and Technology, Engineering Experimental Class (Hongde Academy), and Materials Science and Engineering directly correspond to advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity. However, majors in Chemical Engineering and Materials Science (part of the broader Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Materials category) still face significant social discouragement, which may suppress the overall application heat for this university, which is characterized by chemical and materials disciplines. Number of Physics Category candidates in Hebei: 216,000 in 2021, 298,000 in 2022, 335,000 in 2023, 384,000 in 2024, and 363,000 in 2025. For 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is approximately 609,800, with an estimated 365,000 in Physics Category based on the recent proportion of about 59.8%, a slight increase of about 0.5% from 2025, slightly intensifying competition. Provincial control line: Physics Category undergraduate batch increased from 448 in 2024 to 459 in 2025, a rise of 11 points, reflecting tighter overall competition. Beijing University of Chemical Technology is located in Beijing, which has natural regional appeal for Hebei candidates (close geographical location, Beijing-Tianjin-Hebei coordinated development). The university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Hebei (155 in Physics Category), making it one of the universities in Beijing that enrolls more students from Hebei, with strong local candidate willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors including the 2025 baseline ranking of 15171, a 4.0% enrollment expansion in 2026 (tending to increase the ranking number), a rise of 6 places in Soft Science ranking (enhancing appeal), high Douyin exposure (increasing attention), low social popularity of chemical and materials disciplines (suppressing effect), a slight increase in total Hebei candidates and a rise in the provincial control line (intensifying competition), the expansion effect and competition intensification effect offset each other. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will shift slightly backward (ranking number increases) compared to 2025, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 15518, and a range of 15018–16018.

- Automation (including Automation, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments)
- Chemical Engineering and Technology (Chemical Engineering, Big Data Dual Bachelor's Degree).

- Engineering Experimental Class (Outstanding Engineer College)
- Engineering Experimental Class (High-end Equipment and Intelligent Manufacturing).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics, Physics Electronics and Management)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Advanced Materials)
- Science Experimental Class (Green Chemistry)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Chemical Energy and Biomedicine)
- Environmental Engineering (Environmental Engineering, Big Data Dual Bachelor's Degree).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 15518, range 15018–16018. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (15018) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like Computer Science and Hongde Academy. Candidates with rankings around the middle of the range (15500) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 advantageous discipline majors while also attempting Tier 1. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (16018) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net, while also considering Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Classes with relatively lower rankings. Although the university's advantageous disciplines in chemical engineering and materials science have high discipline evaluations, their social popularity is low, making competition relatively mild. This is suitable for candidates interested in chemical and materials fields to enter advantageous majors with lower rankings.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 2010→2445→2721→2531→2777, showing an overall backward trend. Over the past 3 years, the cumulative backward shift is about 56 places, with small fluctuation. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 2777. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hebei was 18 in 2021, 14 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 22 in 2024, and 24 in 2025. 学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Chemical Technology is a 211 and Double First-Class university, ranked 57th in the 2026 Soft Science Ranking. It is primarily focused on science and engineering, with few History Category majors (only 2-3). Liberal arts students have relatively limited attention to it. Overall reputation is stable; Douyin popularity ranks 7th (high heat), but the hot content mainly revolves around its science and engineering features, with limited direct appeal to History Category students. No abnormal admission records have been observed. The university's A-level disciplines (Chemical Engineering and Technology A, Chemistry A-, Materials Science and Engineering A-) are all in science and engineering, while the History Category majors (Law, Business Administration) have no directly corresponding A-level discipline support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a relatively hot social popularity (recommended), while Business Administration has a divided and wait-and-see social popularity. The number of History Category examinees in Hebei: 202,000 in 2021, 194,000 in 2022, 241,000 in 2023, 244,000 in 2024, and 244,000 in 2025. In 2026, the total number of examinees in the province is about 609,800, and estimated at about 245,000 based on the recent History Category proportion of about 40.2%, a slight increase of about 0.6% compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition. Beijing University of Chemical Technology is located in Beijing, which still has regional appeal for History Category students in Hebei, but the small scale and limited choices of its liberal arts majors may restrict application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2777, the 4.2% enrollment reduction in 2026 (which decreases the ranking number), the slight increase in Hebei History Category examinees and the significant rise in the provincial control line (intensified competition), and the relatively hot popularity of Law (attracting applications), it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward (ranking number decreases) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2678, with a range of 2178–3178.
